states.name: Velle
states.title: Elven Bard
states.description: Velle comes from an ancient tradition of bards which teaches that stories are how cultures survive even after their people are long dead. So, she collects songs and tales from dead cities and societies. To keep stories alive, Velle travels as far as she can, and tells as many people as she can.

states.name: Velle
states.title: Elven Bard
states.description:
As Velle grows older, she wonders what will become of her own life after she passes away. Who will remember her? Who will speak of her own story?

Velle's bardic tradition forbids one from telling any tale of their own life. But nevertheless, she hopes that someday someone will craft a story about her and preserve her memory for the future, just as she is doing for tales of the past.
